summary: POTUS retweet of the same media as the White House post: a video of Trump's Beijing arrival set to music with no speech. It shows a wide floodlit Great Hall of the People, a slow shot of the Chinese flag at night, shallow-focus crowds waving US and Chinese flags, the Air Force One fuselage, and a White House line drawing title card reading 'PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP'.

script.scene: Wide establishing shot of the Great Hall of the People at night, floodlit white facade with red Chinese flags and the national emblem lit above the entrance; press, onlookers, and a dark motorcade in silhouette in the foreground. Music, no speech.
Slow low-angle shot of a single red Chinese flag with gold stars rippling on a pole against a deep black night sky.
Shallow-focus shot from behind rows of greeters in light blue and white outfits waving small US and Chinese flags, with warm spotlights and a red carpet receding into the distance.
Crowd in soft focus raising red flags and US flags toward the Air Force One fuselage lettered 'UNITED STATES OF AMERICA'.
End title card: white line drawing of the White House on a black background with the caption 'PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP'.

notable_text: PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP; UNITED STATES OF AMERICA (Air Force One); tweet: 'The arrival everyone has waited for.'
